title: Valanzocha
body:
# Welcome to Valanzocha !

![Main banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca97d7e9d209a39a8902ebd7d2553de24ac78a3d.jpeg)

This Minecraft modpack is made to allow beginners to start with a more friendly game, thanks to a little amount of usefull addition. 
There is personnal maps, list of recipes, waystones, schematic support, lots of new structures.

This modpack is adventure oriented, and make your exploration more convinient and exciting. 

## List of mod inside this pack

- Complementary Reimagined Sharders
- Iris shaders loaders
- JourneyMap
- Pixlli Ressource Pack (Free version, but you can support the ressource pack buying the 256 or 512 version)
- Extended ItemView and EIV Recipe Book Button
- Waystones
- Gravestones
- Traveler Backpack
- Journeymap
  

Used Minecraft version

Based on Fabric, actualy this modpack is designed to work with the 1.21.10 of Java Minecraft.
